items.summary: Update the working-hour calculation logic in `frontend/src/utils/hoursCalculation.ts` to automatically deduct 30 minutes for lunch on regular working days (leaveType = #noLeave / full-day presence). The updated net hours formula must be: Net Hours = (swipeOut − swipeIn, after clamping) − 30 min lunch + 30 min breakfast bonus (if breakfastAtOffice is true). Half-day leave entries (first half and second half) must NOT have the lunch deduction applied, as per the existing rules. Full-day leave entries continue to return 0 daily hours with no deduction.
